items.title: Membership Growth
items.description: Stepped into the first marketing and branding strategist role. Managed activation across multiple strands including collaboration management with RAB and Tenzing.

items.title: Omni-Channel Campaigns
items.description: Strategized, planned and activated omni-channel campaigns across social media and email marketing (100k+ mailing list), managing in-house and external teams.

items.title: Sports Event Planning
items.description: Project coordinated activity and critical paths across teams for digital event streams in international sports. Planned calendars across F1, Coppa Italia and Matchroom Boxing.
